title: quapoya sulphurea
intro: Quapoya sulphurea, also known as the quapoya or yellow quapoya, is a plant species native to the Andean region of South America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Quapoya sulphurea is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
